title: Kryeit Apocalypse Modpack
description: This is a testing modpack for players of the kryeit server, for joining the "Kryeit Apocalypse" test server while the main server is under maintinence. Please keep in mind that forge is very diffrent from fabric and much content will not be the same.
body:
Test server modpack allowing players to experience Kryeit with create 6 on forge, rebuilding civilization on a limited worldfile from the main server. Playing on this server helps give staff time to resolve issues with the main server and test out the prospect of switching to forge at the same time.


Known issues to be aware of:
No chest/player data,
Out of date or missing chunks,
No ores in chunks from the server (or stone replaced with all ore type stripes in certain chunks),
Enchantment industry changes break shops like glimmerland,

Cool features to play with:
Create 6!!,
A lot of bases and cities are here (mostly) intact,
Spring to life, Pale Garden, Mob Updates in new chunks

Credit to LainMI for cosmetic armor reworked: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked
